\tzpentry{ID5798}{Entropic Quantum Field Strength Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5798 introduces Entropic Quantum Field Strength Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} F_{\text{entropic}} = T \nabla S = \frac{k_B T}{2\pi r_h} \cdot \frac{A c^3}{4G\hbar} = \frac{GMm}{r^2} \left(1 + \mathcal{O}\left(\frac{\ell_P}{r}\right)\right) \end{equation}
